onComponentTokens.notes: Filled-variant text reads against role bg.

notes: Label-indicator archetype: compact status badge with 10-density sizing (micro...ultra). Supports 6 semantic roles (brand/info/danger/success/warning/neutral) × 3 structural variants (filled/outlined/soft).

10-density sizing ladder: micro/tiny/small/base/medium/large/big/huge/mega/ultra. Each density sets height, padding, gap, font-size, icon-size, radius. COMP-SIZE eligible for Figma multi-mode binding.
Three variants: filled (solid role bg + on-component fg), outlined (transparent + role border + role text), soft (role container bg + role text).
Shape variants: rounded (default, radii from tokens) and square (radius: 0). Orthogonal to density and role.
Dot indicator: minimal dot-only badge (no text). Uses --badge-dot-size and --badge-dot-color.
No states — badge is stateless. Motion is inherited from parent (e.g. fade-in with container).
aa-AA on-component derivation auto-picks white or black text for max contrast on each role's filled bg. Manually override with --badge-{role}-filled-fg.
